home.matrixSubtitle: Three product lines for teams and developers in different contexts.

hero.lede: Hitosea is a developer-first open-source product company. Our products are trusted by thousands of teams and developers.

opensource.title: We believe in open source
opensource.lede: Every core product at Hitosea is open source. From DooTask to MenuRay, we believe auditable, self-hostable, customizable software is the future of enterprise software.

openSource.title: Fully open-source
openSource.desc: All our core products are open source — auditable, self-hostable, customizable.

enterprise.title: Enterprise-ready
enterprise.desc: Production-grade self-hosted deployments, compliance, and SLA support.

matrix.title: Product suite
matrix.desc: From team collaboration to AI workspace to vertical SaaS — one vendor, many scenarios.

devFriendly.title: Developer-first
devFriendly.desc: Solid open-source docs, rich APIs and SDKs, active community.

cta.title: Ready to bring Hitosea products to your team?

openSource.heroLede: Our code, product roadmap, and issue tracking are all public. Join us — start by starring a repo.
openSource.communityGithub: Discuss on GitHub Discussions, share best practices, propose ideas
openSource.communityWeChat: WeChat group (add our bot to request an invite)
openSource.contributeDesc: Each repo includes a CONTRIBUTING.md with issue, development, and PR instructions.

about.heroLede: A group of engineers who believe open source can change enterprise software.
about.missionBody: Use open-source, modular products to help teams spend their energy on what truly creates value — not building infrastructure, but shipping better products and serving more customers.
about.doBody: We build three product lines that reinforce each other: enterprise collaboration (centered on DooTask), AI & developer tools (Happy Next, eeui, DooPush), and vertical AI products (MenuRay, Qiujian, TTPOS). Every product is open-source, self-hostable, and enterprise-ready.
about.joinBody: If you believe in open source and love shipping products, we'd like to meet you. Send your résumé to:
